macro.title: Nike cuts 1,400 roles in second round of layoffs this year - CNBC
macro.summary: Nike announced 1,400 layoffs, primarily in its technology department, on Thursday after previously cutting 775 jobs in January.

macro.title: FDA Approves First-Ever Gene Therapy to Restore Hearing - WSJ
Stocks close lower, retreating from records as software shares slump, oil jumps - CNBC
macro.summary: Stocks pulled back on Thursday, led by a drop in software and higher oil prices.

macro.title: Intel stock soars on Q1 earnings beat, strong outlook - Yahoo Finance
macro.summary: Intel reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings and offered a rosy outlook for Q2.

macro.title: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows - BBC
macro.summary: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
